settings.title: Deliver beautiful galleries and delight your couples.

settings.editor: StudioApp is the complete client gallery and photo delivery platform, built by a wedding photographer after delivering over 1,600 weddings. Stunning branded galleries, smooth video streaming, guest uploads, automated emails and print sales — all in one clean dashboard.
Free 7-day trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

settings.html:
Everything You Need

Your complete client delivery platform.

One clean, modern dashboard to run your entire client delivery — from branding and galleries to video, sharing, automated emails, print sales and insights. Nothing you don't need.

  • Client galleries — unlimited, branded, organised in folders.
  • Video streaming — smooth playback on any device.
  • Album & print sales — extra revenue, built in.
  • Guest uploads — every moment in one place.
  • Automated emails — sent from your own address.
  • Activity tracking — see engagement at a glance.

settings.title: Beautiful delivery, from upload to download.

settings.editor: Create unlimited branded galleries (within your plan), organise them into folders, save reusable templates and set beautiful cover images.
Upload your films straight into a gallery. StudioApp creates web-optimised versions that stream smoothly to couples on any device.
Let clients order prints directly from their gallery, then receive and manage every incoming order in one place — extra revenue, built in.
Turn on guest-upload mode so friends and family can add their own photos and videos to the gallery — every moment, in one place.
Send a branded ‘your gallery is ready’ email from your own address, broadcast to all clients, and auto-remind them before a gallery closes.
See engagement on every gallery and track your plan usage — galleries used versus your allowance — so you always stay in control.

settings.html:
Your Branding

Make it unmistakably yours.

Every gallery, client page and email carries your studio’s identity — so couples only ever see your brand, never ours.

  • Your logo across galleries and emails.
  • Studio name & tagline set once.
  • Accent colour to match your brand.
  • Branded share links with the couple’s names.
  • Your sending email (SMTP) for on-brand comms.
  • QR codes — instant, downloadable PDFs.

settings.title: Deliver photos & video in stunning quality.

settings.editor: Upload and deliver in beautiful quality: JPEG, PNG, GIF, TIFF, plus WebP and BMP.
Smooth streaming and high quality: MP4, MOV, plus AVI, MKV, WebM and MTS.

tabs.tab_title: What is client gallery software, and how does StudioApp help photographers?
tabs.tab_content: Client gallery software is where you upload, present and deliver a shoot to your clients online. StudioApp gives wedding and portrait photographers beautiful branded galleries, smooth video streaming, guest uploads, automated emails and print sales — all from one dashboard.

tabs.tab_title: How do I deliver wedding photos and video to my couples?
tabs.tab_content: You upload your images and films into a branded gallery, then share a single link (or QR code). Your couple can view, favourite, download and share their photos and watch their film stream smoothly on any device.

tabs.tab_title: Can wedding guests upload their own photos?
tabs.tab_content: Yes. Turn on guest uploads and friends and family can add their own photos and videos straight into the gallery, so every moment from the day ends up in one place.
Plans start at £15 a month for Starter, £35 for Professional and £65 for Studio. Every plan includes unlimited storage, custom branding, guest uploads and activity tracking.
Yes — there's a free 7-day trial with no credit card required, so you can set up your studio and create your first gallery before you commit.

settings.title: Start your free 7-day trial of StudioApp.

settings.editor: Set up your studio, create your first gallery and see how effortless delivery can be — no credit card required.
